flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of Southern Maryland fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1k → 4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of Southern Maryland rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Southern Maryland fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
